reviews.comment:
Última estación de Servicio de buena calidad si vas en motos, carga acá y si seguís viaje llena bidones. En Fiambala hay pero son bandera blanca.

(Translated by Google)
Last good quality gas station if you're traveling by motorcycle; fill up here, and if you continue your journey, fill up your jerrycans. There are gas stations in Fiambalá, but they're unlicensed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlbnZYWEZ3EAE

reviewer.displayName: Max South Shiny Detail Zona Sur

reviews.comment:
La atención para cargar nafta ningún problema pero los baños muy sucios y para tomar un café hay que tomarse tiempo. No es un lugar para tomarse un café al paso.

(Translated by Google)
The service for filling up the gas pump was fine, but the restrooms were very dirty, and you have to wait a while to get a coffee. It's not a place for a quick coffee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlenFULWpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estuvimos 55 minutos haciendo cola porque  no había combustible y el camión esperando que avancen los autos para cargar, la logística ahí no fue buena, debian prever que era un finde XXL. Los baños estaban cerrados porque no tenian agua y no tienen bar.

(Translated by Google)
We waited in line for 55 minutes because there was no fuel, and the truck was waiting for the cars to move forward so it could refuel. The logistics there were terrible; they should have anticipated that it was a very busy weekend. The restrooms were closed because they had no water, and there's no bar.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURleHJPZDhRRRAB
